name: Blast
description: Tap matching objects in a configurable grid before time runs out.

assets.label: Background
assets.description: Background shown while the game is being played.

assets.label: Objects
assets.description: Game objects shown in the blast grid.

assets.label: End Background
assets.description: Background shown at the end of the game.

assets.label: Tutorial Hand
assets.description: Hand indicator used to guide the player toward a matching group.

assets.label: Soundtrack
assets.description: Looping background music for the playable.

assets.label: Blast Sound
assets.description: Sound effect played when objects are blasted.

config.label: Game Duration (seconds)
config.description: Total playable length in seconds. The game ends when this timer reaches zero unless the player blasts all required target objects first.

config.label: Target Object
config.description: Choose which uploaded object image counts as the target to blast.

config.label: Target Count
config.description: Number of target objects the player needs to blast before the game ends early. The HUD shows this as the remaining target count.

config.label: Minimum Blast Group Size
config.description: Minimum connected same-object group size needed for a tap to remove objects from the board. Higher values make valid moves harder to find.

config.label: Grid Rows
config.description: Number of rows in the object board. More rows increase board density and can make the game feel more complex.

config.label: Grid Columns
config.description: Number of columns in the object board. More columns increase board density and can create wider matching groups.

config.label: Grid Top Offset (px)
config.description: Distance in game-world pixels from the top of the canvas to the top edge of the centered grid panel.

config.label: Grid Padding (px)
config.description: Inner spacing in game-world pixels between the grid panel edge and the nearest object centers.

config.label: Grid Horizontal Gap (px)
config.description: Horizontal spacing in game-world pixels between neighboring object cells.

config.label: Grid Vertical Gap (px)
config.description: Vertical spacing in game-world pixels between neighboring object cells.

config.label: Grid Panel Corner Radius (px)
config.description: Corner radius in game-world pixels for the rounded grid panel behind the objects.

config.label: Grid Background Color
config.description: Hex color for the grid panel fill behind all objects.

config.label: Grid Panel Border Color
config.description: Hex color for the border around the grid panel.

config.label: Grid Panel Border Width (px)
config.description: Border width in game-world pixels around the grid panel.

config.label: Grid Panel Shadow Color
config.description: Hex color for the grid panel drop shadow.

config.label: Object Size (px)
config.description: Rendered width and height in game-world pixels for each board object.

config.label: Object Fall Speed (px/sec)
config.description: Falling speed in game-world pixels per second for objects dropping into empty spaces after a blast.

config.label: Target Spawn Chance
config.description: Probability from 0 to 1 that a newly generated object is the target object. For example, 0.2 means 20% of refilled objects are targets.

config.label: Minimum Target Cells
config.description: Minimum number of target objects kept on the board after initial generation or refill, as long as targets are still required.

config.label: Instruction Text
config.description: Instruction copy shown between the top HUD and the object grid during gameplay.

config.label: Instruction Font Size (CSS px)
config.description: Instruction text size in CSS pixels.

config.label: Instruction Text Color
config.description: Hex color for the instruction text.

config.label: Instruction Stroke Color
config.description: Hex color for the outline stroke around the instruction text.

config.label: Instruction Pulse Scale
config.description: Largest scale reached by the repeating instruction text pulse. 1 means no size pulse; 1.04 means 4% larger at the peak.

config.label: Instruction Pulse Duration (ms)
config.description: Duration of one full instruction text pulse cycle, in milliseconds.

config.label: End Button Text
config.description: Text shown on the call-to-action button on the end screen.

config.label: End Button Width (CSS px)
config.description: End-screen button width in CSS pixels.

config.label: End Button Height (CSS px)
config.description: End-screen button height in CSS pixels.

config.label: End Button Font Size (CSS px)
config.description: End-screen button text size in CSS pixels.

config.label: End Button Vertical Position (%)
config.description: Vertical position of the end-screen button center as a percentage of screen height. Lower values place it higher on the screen.

config.label: End Button Background Color
config.description: Hex color for the end-screen call-to-action button background.

config.label: End Button Text Color
config.description: Hex color for the end-screen call-to-action button text.

config.label: End Button Pulse Scale
config.description: Largest scale reached by the repeating button pulse animation. 1 means no size increase; 1.08 means 8% larger at the peak.

config.label: End Button Pulse Duration (ms)
config.description: Duration of one full button pulse animation cycle, in milliseconds.

config.label: Canvas Width (px)
config.description: Internal canvas width in game-world pixels. Match this with the creative aspect ratio; grid placement, object sizes, and tap coordinates are measured against this width.

config.label: Canvas Height (px)
config.description: Internal canvas height in game-world pixels. Match this with the creative aspect ratio; grid placement, object sizes, and tap coordinates are measured against this height.

config.label: Canvas Background Fill
config.description: Hex color shown behind the background image whenever the canvas is visible outside the artwork, such as during viewport cropping or letterboxing.

config.label: Low-Time Warning Threshold (seconds)
config.description: Remaining time threshold in seconds when the HUD timer switches to the low-time warning color.

config.label: HUD Top Offset (CSS px)
config.description: Distance in CSS pixels from the safe-area top of the screen to the top of the HUD.

config.label: HUD Width (vw)
config.description: HUD width as a percentage of viewport width. For example, 88 means the HUD is 88vw until capped by maximum width.

config.label: HUD Maximum Width (CSS px)
config.description: Maximum HUD width in CSS pixels, used to keep the timer and target panels readable on larger screens.

config.label: HUD Height (CSS px)
config.description: Height in CSS pixels for the timer and target HUD panels.

config.label: HUD Panel Gap (CSS px)
config.description: Horizontal gap in CSS pixels between the timer panel and the target-count panel.

config.label: HUD Font Size (CSS px)
config.description: Text size in CSS pixels for the timer and target count in the HUD.

config.label: HUD Text Color
config.description: Hex color for normal HUD text.

config.label: Low-Time Timer Color
config.description: Hex color for the timer text after the low-time warning threshold is reached.

config.label: HUD Panel Background Color
config.description: Hex color for the timer and target panel backgrounds.

config.label: HUD Panel Background Opacity
config.description: Opacity from 0 to 1 for the timer and target panel backgrounds. Text, icons, and borders remain fully opaque.

config.label: HUD Panel Border Color
config.description: Hex color for the timer and target panel borders.

config.label: HUD Target Icon Size (CSS px)
config.description: Rendered target icon size in CSS pixels inside the HUD target panel.

config.label: Blast Duration (ms)
config.description: How long the blast ring and particles remain visible, in milliseconds, after a valid group is tapped.

config.label: Blast Ring Start Radius (px)
config.description: Starting radius in game-world pixels for the expanding blast ring.

config.label: Blast Ring End Radius (px)
config.description: Final radius in game-world pixels reached by the expanding blast ring.

config.label: Blast Ring Width (px)
config.description: Initial stroke width in game-world pixels for the blast ring.

config.label: Blast Ring Color
config.description: Hex color for the blast ring glow and stroke.

config.label: Blast Particle Count
config.description: Number of small circular particles emitted for each blasted object.

config.label: Blast Particle Distance (px)
config.description: Maximum travel distance in game-world pixels for blast particles from the object center.

config.label: Blast Particle Size (px)
config.description: Base particle radius in game-world pixels before per-particle random scaling is applied.

config.label: Blast Particle Colors
config.description: JSON array of hex colors cycled across emitted particles, such as ["#ffffff", "#ffe66d"].

config.label: Show Tutorial Hand
config.description: Controls whether the animated hand prompt points to a valid matching group.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Idle Delay (ms)
config.description: How long after the latest object tap the hand waits before appearing again.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Width (px)
config.description: Rendered tutorial hand width in game-world pixels.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Height (px)
config.description: Rendered tutorial hand height in game-world pixels.

config.label: Tutorial Hand X Offset (px)
config.description: Horizontal offset in game-world pixels from the hinted object center to the tutorial hand center.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Y Offset (px)
config.description: Vertical offset in game-world pixels from the hinted object center to the tutorial hand center.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Pulse Scale
config.description: Largest scale reached by the repeating tutorial hand tap pulse. 1 means no size pulse; 1.12 means 12% larger at the peak.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Cycle Duration (ms)
config.description: Length of one complete tutorial hand pulse cycle, in milliseconds.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Fade Duration (ms)
config.description: Duration of the fade in when the hand appears and fade out after a player tap.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Opacity
config.description: Tutorial hand opacity from 0 to 1. Use lower values for a subtler prompt and 1 for fully opaque artwork.

config.label: Soundtrack Volume
config.description: Background music volume multiplier from 0 to 1. This affects only the looping soundtrack.

config.label: Blast Sound Volume
config.description: Blast sound effect volume multiplier from 0 to 1. This affects the sound played after a valid blast.
